headline: AutoZone Q2 Earnings: New Store Openings Drive Growth, But Weak Demand Weighs
summary: AutoZone's growth is driven by new store openings, while macro headwinds and weak consumer sentiment constrain demand. Read why AZO stock is a hold.

raw.headline: AutoZone Q2 Earnings: New Store Openings Drive Growth, But Weak Demand Weighs
raw.summary: AutoZone's growth is driven by new store openings, while macro headwinds and weak consumer sentiment constrain demand. Read why AZO stock is a hold.

headline: Previewing The 2026 Q1 Earnings Season: A Closer Look
summary: The 2026 Q1 earnings season will take the spotlight when the big banks report their results in about four weeks, but we will already have seen fiscal February-quarter results from almost two dozen companies by then, including Oracle and Adobe.

raw.headline: Previewing The 2026 Q1 Earnings Season: A Closer Look
